name: ofw-mcp
description: OurFamilyWizard co-parenting tools for Claude — messages, calendar, expenses, and journal

ofw_username.title: OFW Email
ofw_username.description: Your OurFamilyWizard login email address. Optional — if omitted, the server falls back to the fetchproxy browser extension (requires being signed in to ourfamilywizard.com in your browser).

ofw_password.title: OFW Password
ofw_password.description: Your OurFamilyWizard password. Optional — see ofw_username.

ofw_inline_attachments.title: Return attachments inline
ofw_inline_attachments.description: When on, ofw_download_attachment returns bytes inline as MCP content (images render directly; other files come back as embedded resources) instead of writing to disk. Recommended for sandboxed hosts like Claude Desktop where the model cannot read files written to ~/Downloads. Callers can still override per-call via the tool's `inline` argument.

ofw_attachments_dir.title: Attachments download directory
ofw_attachments_dir.description: Directory where ofw_download_attachment writes files when not returning inline. Defaults to ~/Downloads/ofw-mcp/. Pick a directory that is readable by your MCP host.

ofw_write_mode.title: Write mode
ofw_write_mode.description: Structural write gate. "none" = no write tools registered (read/sync/search only); "drafts" = draft-level writes only (save/delete drafts, upload attachments — never send or calendar/expense/journal writes); "all" = everything (default). Unrecognized values fail closed to "none".

ofw_calendar_writes.title: Calendar writes in drafts mode
ofw_calendar_writes.description: When Write mode is "drafts", also register the calendar write tools (create/update/delete event). Calendar events have no draft stage but are reversible (editable/deletable), unlike a sent message. Redundant in "all"; never overrides "none".

tools.name: ofw_get_profile
tools.description: Get current user and co-parent info

tools.name: ofw_get_notifications
tools.description: Get dashboard summary: unread messages, upcoming events, outstanding expenses

tools.name: ofw_list_message_folders
tools.description: List message folders and unread counts

tools.name: ofw_get_unread_sent
tools.description: List sent messages the co-parent has not yet viewed

tools.name: ofw_upload_attachment
tools.description: Upload a file from disk to use as an attachment on a message or draft

tools.name: ofw_download_attachment
tools.description: Download a message attachment by fileId — returns bytes inline or writes to disk

tools.name: ofw_sync_messages
tools.description: Sync messages from OFW into local cache

tools.name: ofw_list_events
tools.description: List calendar events in a date range
